title: Rejuvenation
description: Bringing the new textures to the old Minecraft.
body:
![Rejuvenation logo with text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f54d604a96d24b4978eaf42065d80c30175737f.png)

Rejuvenation is a work in progress resource pack that transfers the new textures of Minecraft to the older versions. The idea is that people can enjoy the older version of Minecraft with the new textures.

![To-Do](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd7c0aee5428f6986128b2e57d374d3bbfd4f108.png)

- Mod Support
- Multiple Versions (Hopefully up to 1.12.2)
- Entities
